title: Buying Tickets
scene: 你在博物馆售票处买票。

turns.cn: 成人二十五，学生十八，周三傍晚免费。
turns.en: Adults twenty-five, students eighteen. Free Wednesday evenings.

turns.cn: 两张成人票，有中文讲解器吗？
turns.en: Two adult tickets. Do you have audio guides in Chinese?
Yes. Twenty-dollar deposit, refunded on return.
Is the special exhibit extra?

turns.cn: 包含在通票里，从二楼开始。
turns.en: It's included. Start on the second floor.
Do I need to check my backpack?

turns.cn: 大包寄存，小包可背前面。
turns.en: Large bags must be checked. Small ones worn on your front.

title: Asking Directions
scene: 你在博物馆里找埃及展区。

turns.cn: 请问埃及木乃伊展厅怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to the Egyptian mummy gallery?
Straight ahead to the elevator, third floor, then left.
Is photography allowed?

turns.cn: 一般展区可以，别开闪光灯。
turns.en: In most galleries yes, but no flash.
Which floor has restrooms?
Every floor, next to the elevators.
Thank you!

title: Guided Tour
scene: 你参加博物馆免费导览团。

turns.cn: 欢迎参加十一点导览，一小时。
turns.en: Welcome to the eleven o'clock tour. It'll be about an hour.
What period is this painting from?

turns.cn: 十九世纪印象派，莫奈的学生所作。
turns.en: Nineteenth-century Impressionism, by a student of Monet.
Can we step closer?
Within the rope line, but don't touch the frame.
Where does the tour end?

turns.cn: 礼品店门口，有问题随时问。
turns.en: By the gift shop. Feel free to ask questions anytime.

title: Gift Shop
scene: 参观结束，你在博物馆礼品店购物。

turns.en: Need a bag? Members get ten percent off.

turns.cn: 非会员，买这张海报和明信片。
turns.en: I'm not a member. I'll take this poster and postcards.
Twenty-two fifty total.
Can I mail international postcards from here?

turns.cn: 柜台有邮票，街角有邮筒。
turns.en: We sell stamps at the counter. There's a mailbox on the corner.
I'll pay by card.
Please sign here. Thanks for visiting.
